race.comment: Open race. NAVYONTHEHIGHWAY (11) came from last on the bend to get up for third when resuming over 1000m at Eagle Farm a fortnight ago. Up in class but drops 6.5kgs and is better placed out to this distance. Sure to be powering home again. Three-time stakes winner HIDDEN WEALTH (1) was shuffled back mid-race then rallied late ton be beaten just a length when fresh from a spell in the Listed Ascot over 1000m at Eagle Farm last time out. Loves soft tracks and with McDonald to steer he looks the biggest threat. ABOUT TO EXPLODE (12) continued his outstanding form with a narrow defeat over today's trip at Eagle Farm recently. Untried at this level but his 1200m credentials are hard to fault. BUNDELLA (15) is on a run of four wins, all at 1200m. Takes a quantum leap today but in this mood he cannot be ruled out. Plenty of other chances including METALART (4) who goes well fresh and has won five from eight on soft ground.
